    P

    ParticipantsById(Long) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Displays the number of participants for a specific music band by its ID.
    ParticipantsByIdCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for displaying the number of participants for a specific band.
    ParticipantsByIdCommand(Long) - Constructor for class com.commands.ParticipantsByIdCommand
    Constructs a ParticipantsByIdCommand with the specified band ID.
    peek() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Returns the minimum element without removing it.
    PLACEHOLDER - Enum constant in enum class com.model.MusicGenre
    Placeholder value - not a valid genre
    POST_ROCK - Enum constant in enum class com.model.MusicGenre
    Post rock genre
    printAll() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Prints all elements in the collection to standard output.
    PrintHelp() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Displays help information about all available commands.
    printHistory() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Prints the history of the last 11 commands executed.
    PrintHistory() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Displays the history of the last 11 commands executed.
    printMetadata() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Prints detailed metadata about the collection including type, initialization date, element count, and metadata history.
    PSYCHEDELIC_ROCK - Enum constant in enum class com.model.MusicGenre
    Psychedelic rock genre
